case_title: RONALD TIMBERLAKE VS. CAROL S. HOLMES

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FEE FOR SERVICE: $20.00 SERVED JUL-04-2016, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT HOLMES, CAROL S.

ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT HOLMES, CAROL S.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-12-2016 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TIMBERLAKE, RONALD RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HOLMES, CAROL S. $1,800.00 PRINCIPAL, $70.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,870.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
